2011.bio: He became Muslim on the day of opening of Makkah. According to others, he was martyred in battle of Yarmouk or died later in 'Uthman time.

2030.full_name: al-Walid bin al-Walid b. al-Mughira b. 'Abdullah b. 'Umar b. Makhzum b. Yaqazah b. Murrah
2030.bio: He was captured by the Muslim at the battle of Badr. His brothers paid the ransom but he went back to Medina and became Muslim. He was taken back to Makkah and was imprisoned with 'Ayyash bin Rabi' and Salama bin Hisham. Prophet(ﷺ) prayed for their release for 3 years. He died when he entered Medina due to injury he suffered during his escape from Makkah.
2030.children: al-Walid bin al-Walid bin al-Walid b. al-Mughirah ('Abdullah)

2031.full_name: al-Walid/A'bdullah bin al-Walid b. al-Walid b. al-Mughira b. 'Abdullah b. 'Umar b. Makhzum b. Yaqaza

2050.full_name: Fatima bint al-Aswad bin 'Abd al-Asad b. Hilal b. 'Abdullah b. 'Umar b. Makhzum b. Yaqazah b. Murrah
2050.arabic: فاطمة بنت الأسود بن عبد الأسد
2050.bio: She is the one who stole and her hand were cut off as per Prophet(ﷺ) order. According to some other sources, the person whose hand were cut off was Umm 'Amr  bint Sufyan bin  'Abd al-Asad (Fatima' Cousin)

2051.full_name: Umm 'Amr bint Sufyan bin 'Abd al-Asad b. Hilal b. 'Abdullah b. 'Umar b. Makhzum b. Yaqazah b. Murrah

2051.bio: She is the one who stole and her hand were cut off as per Prophet(ﷺ) order. According to some other sources, the person whose hand were cut off was Fatima bint al-Aswad bin 'Abd al-Asad (Umm 'Amr's  Cousin)

2060.full_name: Sa'id bin Yarbu' b. 'Ankatha b. 'Amir b. Makhzum b. Yaqazah b. Murra b. Ka'b b. Lu'ayy
2060.bio: His old name was Asram. He lived for about 120 years.
2060.kunya: Abu Yarbu', Abu Hud, Abu Murra

2061.full_name: 'Abdur Rahman bin Sa'id bin Yarbu' b. 'Ankatha b. 'Amir b. Makhzum b. Yaqazah b. Murra b. Ka'b

2061.bio: He is most likely a Tabi'.

2064.arabic: السائب بن أبي السائب القرشي المكي
2064.bio: According to some, he was killed at Badr as dis-believer. BUt the other said he became Muslim on the day of conquest and according to one tradition he was the partner of Prophet(ﷺ) before Islam. (Allah knows the best)
2064.spouses: Ramla bin 'Urwa of B.Hilal b. 'Amir b. Sa'sa'

2066.mother_name: Ramla bin 'Urwa of B.Hilal b. 'Amir b. Sa'sa'
2066.bio: According to some, he was killed at Badr alongside his father as dis-believer. BUt the other said he became Muslim on the day of conquest.

2090.arabic: الحكم بن كيسان مولى لبني مخزوم
2090.bio: He was arrested by 'Abdullah bin Jahsh and was taken to Medina where he accepted Islam.
